title: Contact - Stephen Kinnock - Labour MP for Aberafan Maesteg
headings: h3: Stephen Kinnock - Labour MP for Aberafan Maesteg
h3: To contact my Parliamentary Office, please use the details below:
h3: Minister of State for Care covering adult social care, primary care, and community care
text_excerpt: Contact - Stephen Kinnock - Labour MP for Aberafan Maesteg Skip to main content Join Get Involved Donate Aberafan Maesteg Events Better Off Calculator Cost of Living Advice Booklet 2024 Parliament Shadow Minister for Immigration Shadow Minister for the Armed Forces Shadow Minister for Asia and the Pacific News Press & Articles Newsletter Annual Report Campaigns Pride In Place Upper Afan Valley Standing Up For Steel Floating Offshore Wind Contact Here to help Unacceptable Behaviour Policy About GDPR/Data Protection More Search Search the website Search Menu Contact Stephen Kinnock - Labour MP for Aberafan Maesteg Address Unit 2 Water Street Business Centre Water Street Port Talbot SA12 6LF Unit 2 Water Street Business Centre Water Street Port Talbot SA12 6LF '> View on Google Maps Telephone 01639 897660 Email [email protected] To contact my Parliamentary Office, please use the details below: Write: Stephen Kinnock MP, House Of Commons, LONDON, SW1A 0AA Call: 0207 219 8801 Minister of State for Care covering adult social care, primary care, and community care My constituency office and parliamentary office do not deal with Ministerial correspondence. If you wish to contact me in a Ministerial capacity please use the following details: Email: [email protected] Write: Ministerial Correspondence and Public Enquiries Unit Department of Health and Social Care 39 Victoria Street London SW1H 0EU Contact details Unit 2 Water Street Business Centre Water Street Port Talbot SA12 6LF Unit 2 Water Street Business Centre Water Street Port Talbot SA12 6LF '> View on Google Maps Email: [email protected] Further details Promoted by Hollie Ridley on behalf of Stephen Kinnock, both at the Labour Party, 20 Rushworth Street, London SE1 0SS ©2026 Copyright Labour All rights reserved.
